name: Pasta w/ Smoked Mozzarella, Asparagas & Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup dried tomatoes, sliced into strips
3/4 lb asparagus, cut diagonally into 1-inch pieces
1 tablespoon fresh thyme leaves or 1 teaspoon dried thyme
1/4 lb smoked mozzarella, cubed into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried tomato strips in the cup of warm water for 3-5 minutes until they begin to soften. Drain and reserve the liquid.
2. Bring a large pot of water to boiling. Add asparagus and cook for 3 minutes until tender but still crisp. Remove from the water and set aside.
3. In the same pot of boiling water, cook the pasta according to package instructions. While the pasta is cooking:
a. Heat olive oil over medium heat in a large skillet. Add onion and sauté for 5 minutes.
b. Reduce heat to low. Add garlic and sauté for another 3 minutes.
c. Stir in reserved tomato liquid, asparagus, thyme leaves or dried thyme, and salt. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Drain the pasta and return it to the pot. Toss with remaining olive oil.
5. Place the pasta on a serving platter and top with the tomato-asparagus mixture and smoked mozzarella. Serve immediately, or chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
